Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Petition For Writ Of Mandate (Opposition Due On 3/9/12) is Off calendar. Duplicate entry.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writ Of Mandate; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julia M. Adams, Esq., of The Epstein Group, Tel. 415.863.5718, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Tara M. Steeley, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4655, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.
Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq., of Bravo & Margulies, Tel. 415.512.6700, appearing for Real Party in Interest.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BETTY MORRIS' Motion For Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission. Each party to submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
